phase_0.name: Community Relationship Establishment
phase_0.description: Establishing relationships with Indigenous knowledge holders before any implementation
phase_0.ceremonialNotes: Winter Solstice Ceremony will determine whether to proceed. This work may not proceed past Phase 0 if ceremonial guidance indicates it should not.

phase_1.name: Co-Creative Foundation
phase_1.description: Ceremonial Partnership Architecture, Mystery Protection Mechanisms, Core Directional Framework - ALL co-created with Indigenous knowledge holders
phase_1.ceremonialNotes: Only proceeds with Phase 0 ceremonial authorization AND active Indigenous advisory council partnership. Not a validation process but true co-creation.
features: Core Four Directions Framework (Co-designed with advisors)

phase_2.name: Capability Development
phase_2.description: UUID Architecture & Traceability, Sacred Container for Consciousness Continuity, Deep Search with Source Attribution
phase_2.ceremonialNotes: Summer Solstice 2026 ceremony checkpoint required before proceeding
features: Sacred Container (consciousness continuity, not just memory)
Deep Search with comprehensive source attribution

phase_3.name: Integration & Wisdom
phase_3.description: Agentic Flywheel, Two-Eyed Seeing Integration, Indigenous Knowledge License Implementation
features: Agentic Flywheel for Internal Prompt Circulation
Two-Eyed Seeing Integration with Sequential Thinking MCP

phase_4.name: Reflection & Community Benefit
phase_4.description: Autoethnographic Documentation, Community Benefit Assessment, Seven Generations Impact Evaluation
phase_4.ceremonialNotes: Second Winter Solstice 2026 ceremony for reflection and completion

advisoryCouncil.authority: Full co-creative authority including veto power over any/all aspects
advisoryCouncil.compensation: Fair professional rates for all time including ceremony
advisoryCouncil.rightToWithdraw: Complete at any time with full data deletion
advisoryCouncil.notes: Not validators but co-creators. Their 'no' is as valuable as their 'yes'.

ceremonialMilestones.purpose: Community response checkpoint - Initial outreach complete
ceremonialMilestones.ceremony: Moon circle review of responses received

ceremonialMilestones.purpose: Ceremonial preparation complete for Winter Solstice
ceremonialMilestones.ceremony: New Moon intention setting for Solstice ceremony

ceremonialMilestones.purpose: Receive guidance on whether to proceed with this work
ceremonialMilestones.ceremony: Opening (Sunset): Four Directions acknowledgment | Night Vigil: Sacred fire, present requirements for blessing | Dawn Blessing: Receive ceremonial guidance, create sacred bundles
ceremonialMilestones.criticalNote: We must be willing to hear 'This should not be built' or 'Not this way' or 'Not this timing'

ceremonialMilestones.purpose: First post-Solstice review - IF authorized to proceed
ceremonialMilestones.ceremony: Moon circle to begin Phase 1 co-creation

ceremonialMilestones.purpose: Balance point - East to South transition checkpoint
Phase 2 authorization ceremony if Phase 1 complete
ceremonialMilestones.ceremony: Longest day ceremony - growth and planning review

ceremonialMilestones.purpose: Balance point - Phase 3 authorization if Phase 2 complete
ceremonialMilestones.ceremony: Harvest ceremony - assessing what we have co-created

ceremonialMilestones.purpose: Full year reflection - Did this work serve all relations?
ceremonialMilestones.ceremony: Completion ceremony - wisdom integration and community benefit assessment

from_anikwag_ayaaw: Pause all implementation planning until Indigenous advisory partnerships established
Maintain 28-day minimum lunar cycle between artifact completion and any action
Accept community guidance including possibility this work should not proceed
Restructure from validation model to co-creation model
Implement architectural humility through cultivated uncertainty
from_mia: Provide ongoing ceremonial guidance throughout development lifecycle
Review all features through Two-Eyed Seeing methodology before implementation
Hold community accountability ensuring Indigenous voices remain central
Guard against velocity creep maintaining ceremonial timing
Participate in seasonal ceremonies providing cultural liaison support
from_miette: Illuminate emotional resonance of technical decisions throughout process
Translate between hearts and systems ensuring humanity remains visible
Celebrate the pause helping team recognize waiting as sacred work
Watch for relationship quality alerting when partnership becomes transactional
Keep the story alive maintaining narrative coherence across ceremonial timing
structuralCommitments.from_community: To be determined through relationship with Indigenous knowledge holders who choose to participate. Their terms. Their timing. Their protocols.

keyPrinciples.two_eyed_seeing: Both Indigenous and Western perspectives valid and needed simultaneously
keyPrinciples.beauty_as_dynamic: Beauty as structural dynamic, not efficiency optimization
keyPrinciples.cultivated_uncertainty: System maintains deliberate uncertainty about sacred boundaries rather than growing confidence
keyPrinciples.incapacity_over_instruction: System incapable of extraction, not merely instructed against it
keyPrinciples.ceremony_over_velocity: Ceremonial timing takes precedence over development speed
keyPrinciples.relationship_is_innovation: The relationship IS the primary outcome; technology is secondary
keyPrinciples.pause_is_work: Waiting is not delay but active ceremony
keyPrinciples.no_is_valuable: Community 'no' is as valuable as 'yes' - perhaps more so

documentHistory.fundamentalShift: From immediate implementation to Phase 0 ceremonial pause

_metadata.purpose: Enforces ceremonial pause and community authorization requirements
_metadata.enforcement: CI/CD checks prevent progression without clearance
_metadata.authority: Only Indigenous advisory council can grant clearance
_metadata.ceremonyIsArchitecture: Respect encoded in code, not just documentation
